communityTips.author: Amit Verma
communityTips.tip: Focus heavily on system design. Google loves candidates who can think at scale. Practice designing systems like YouTube, Gmail, etc.

communityTips.author: Neha Gupta
communityTips.tip: TCS aptitude test has a lot of time pressure. Practice speed math and logical reasoning daily. Don't spend too much time on difficult questions.

communityTips.author: Rajesh Kumar
communityTips.tip: Infosys technical interviews focus on practical coding. Be ready to write code on paper/whiteboard. Practice common algorithms without IDE.

communityTips.author: Priya Sharma
communityTips.tip: Google's behavioral interviews are as important as technical ones. Use the STAR method and prepare stories that show leadership and impact.

communityTips.author: Karthik Reddy
communityTips.tip: For TCS coding round, focus on basic programming concepts. They test fundamentals more than complex algorithms. Clean, readable code is valued.
